svg.text: Conv_Simple / CV-101 (garage conveyor) — supply → CB1 → Q1 (MC) → VFD1 (GS10) → M1 · every conductor FIELD VERIFY
route power ⊥ control wiring — GS10_UM.txt L1787
Bench supply voltage & phase count, GS10 exact model/frame, breaker rating, wire gauge: NOT DOCUMENTED — every conductor FIELD
VERIFY. P00.01 = 1.60 A (2026-05-20 export) is the only sizing clue. If 1φ model, input = R/L1, S/L2 only (GS10_UM L1971).
• Never start/stop via input power (L1811-1813); the MC (Q1) is emergency/safety switching only (L1754-1757).
• LOTO + wait ≥5 min for DC-bus discharge before touching (WI p.2 §2).
• Monitored e-stop is NOT a safety stop — hardwire S0 to remove drive power per NFPA 79 / EN 60204-1.
• PE resistance ≤0.1Ω (L1760-61); shield/conduit bonded both ends (L1792-95); RFI jumper in/out FIELD VERIFY (L1693-1718, OI-17).
• Q1 coil ← O-02 (E-006); R-C surge absorber both ends recommended (GS10 manual);
• CB1 REQUIRED per GS10_UM L1758-1759 — type/rating unknown (OI-15).
• M1: swap any two motor leads to reverse — GS10_UM L1773-1776.
• VFD control source = Modbus — see E-007. No control wiring on this sheet.
terminals per GS10 UM 1st Ed Rev B;
MC placement per manual recommendation; as-built UNVERIFIED
